title: Cobblemon: Biosphere Expanded
description: This pack adds Cobblemon spawn compatibility for biome mods that aren't fully compatible. Biomes without tags intended for Cobblemon have been added for consistency. Added modded biome spawns to Mons that fit the area, but wouldn't spawn without defining.
body:
This pack adds Cobblemon spawn compatibility for biome mods that aren't fully compatible as of now. 

V4 Currently Supports: Better End & Nether, Nyctophobia, Regions Unexplored, Terrestria, Alex's Caves, Blue Skies, Deeper and Darker, Galosphere, Mystics Biomes, Promenade, Stellarity, Traverse, Tropicraft, Twilight Forest, and YUNG's Cave Biomes.

You do not need to have all the mods installed for it to work, just one will do the trick.

This pack covers adding biomes that were not tagged for Cobblemon to read properly.
Including adding fitting biomes in spawn files for a growing list of mons.
(As well as many tweaked spawn rates, and conditions required for spawning.)

V3 Spawn Reference Sheet (Wiki) in External Resources.

V4 Spawn Sheet not made yet, will be soon though.

Happy Hunting!
